_comment: Baseline parity tolerances per module. Maximum allowed difference between Dart implementation and C++ Framework golden reference. Updated whenever parity is verified. Use tool/verify_parity.dart to regenerate.
_workflow: 4. If improvements: update baseline tolerances downward
5. If regressions: tolerances exceeded => fix the bug
_format: Each module records max absolute difference observed and counts of samples exceeding standard thresholds.

math.easingSine.notes: C++ float vs Dart double precision. Should be near-identical.

math.cardanoAlgorithmForBezier.notes: Cubic equation solver. Float vs double precision.

math.matrixMultiply.notes: Pure float arithmetic, should match exactly within float precision.

math.matrixInverse.notes: Cofactor / determinant. Minor float vs double drift expected.

math.directionToRadian.notes: atan2 + normalization. Float vs double precision.

breath.sineWave.notes: Pure sine wave. Some samples exceed 1e-6 due to float vs double precision in cycle ratio.

modelSetting.parsing.notes: All field parsing must match exactly (strings, ints).

expression.weightSamples.notes: Expression blend math should produce identical float output.

motion.curves.notes: Float vs double precision in BezierEvaluate (linear-t mode used when AreBeziersRestricted=true). Max observed 9.6e-4.

motionQueue.priorityTransition.notes: Priority motion transition with fade-in/fade-out crossfade. Max observed 6.5e-5 (float precision).

physics.300frame.notes: Iterative pendulum simulation. Float vs double accumulation over 300 frames.

pose.120frame.notes: Part opacity transitions. Perfect match across 120 frames.
